summary: Frontend-only e2e of the NEW Receipt printing feature. End-to-end happy path executed: login cashier/1234 -> open shift 500000 -> scanned 4 barcodes (8991111000011, 8994444000066, 8990000000226, 8991234567890) -> grid GRAND TOTAL=136.000 -> F5 -> payment-cash-input=200000 -> payment-confirm-btn. Receipt modal opened automatically with TRX-20260622-0001 in title. 80mm thermal preview rendered all 4 line items (INDOMIE GORENG ORIGINAL 85G, BERAS RAMOS PREMIUM 5KG, BENG BENG CHOCOLATE 20G, AMPLOP PAPERLINE PUTIH PJG BOX) with name/qty/unit/price/linetotal. Subtotal 136.000, TOTAL 136.000, Bayar (CASH) 200.000, Kembalian 64.000, TERIMA KASIH + Selamat Belanja Kembali footer. All 5 action buttons present: receipt-print-btn, receipt-usb-btn, receipt-download-btn, receipt-copy-btn, receipt-close-btn. #receipt-print DOM container present for window.print() CSS swap. Download triggered a file named exactly TRX-20260622-0001.escpos.bin with sonner toast 'File ESC-POS ... diunduh.'. Copy emitted toast 'Teks struk disalin ke clipboard.'. USB click produced graceful sonner error 'Failed to execute requestDevice on USB: No device selected.' (expected in headless test env). Close button closed modal AND the POS grid is empty (KOSONG marker visible). F6 opened Daftar Transaksi, showing the just-completed transaction with CETAK button data-testid=trx-reprint-TRX-20260622-0001; clicking it reopened the Receipt modal with all 4 items hydrated correctly (qty x price lines = 4, subtotal/total/footer all present), confirming mockApi.listTransactions hydrates items from db.transaction_items. window.print() itself was NOT triggered (would open OS dialog) as instructed.
critical_code_review_comments: ReceiptModal.jsx and escpos.js are clean: text + ESC-POS share the same builder primitives (twoCol/line/centerText) so on-screen preview is byte-equivalent to printer output — single source of truth, good.

posStore.finalize() now correctly returns {...trx, items: itemRows} so the immediately-paid receipt has items without re-querying Dexie. Reprint path goes through api.listTransactions which hydrates from db.transaction_items (already fixed in iteration 2). Both contexts verified.

Carry-over (LOW): the @media print global selector hides everything except #receipt-print on window.print() — this is the documented approach but it also hides any sonner toast / second open dialog if user prints during another flow. Acceptable.
Carry-over (LOW): trxCounter still in-memory in posStore (resets on reload); persist per-shift counter to Dexie.
Carry-over (LOW): Radix DialogContent a11y warning still present on ReceiptModal too (no DialogDescription). Cosmetic console-only.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 6 receipt acceptance scenarios + happy-path regression PASS)

seed_data_creation: None. seedIfEmpty auto-seeded products/customers/users. IndexedDB + localStorage cleared at the start of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Receipt feature fully PASS. Future work: (a) verify @media print actually renders only #receipt-print via PDF-to-buffer test (skipped here per instructions), (b) extend to multi-payment receipts (CASH + DEBIT mix) — currently only CASH path tested, (c) verify customer/member name line in receipt when customer is attached, (d) verify negative-qty RETURN receipt rendering. Regression of login/openShift/scan/F5/F6 stacking still PASS.
rca of the issue: No new issues found. The two known prerequisites for items hydration (posStore.finalize returning itemRows + mockApi.listTransactions hydrating items) are both verified working end-to-end across the live payment path and the F6 reprint path. Download filename pattern exactly matches `<TRX#>.escpos.bin` as spec'd. WebUSB graceful failure path also verified — the catch clause surfaces e.message via sonner toast instead of crashing.
